entry.title: Re: ONB-EC Integration: Sending data from Custom Data Collection to the Employee Profile
entry.content:
How did you navigate to userConfig>ONB2Process>User

When i navigate to userConfig> it takes me to Onboarding Data collection and not ONB2Process.

Any help will be appreciated

entry.title: Re: Students can get SAP-Certified for Free - Here is the Why and How
entry.content: Is the free certification attempt to students still available?

entry.title: Re: How do I reset RSMDATASTATE after a load to a Datamar...
entry.content: When you say "load has been decommissioned" Can you elaborate? Do you still have transformation? if yes, you can create a new DTP or use existing DTP to perform an init without data transfer by setting the DTP processing mode as  'No Data Transfer; Delta Status in Source: Fetched'. Once you execute the load with this setting, the DataMart criteria will be fulfilled and you will be able to compress the request in source. Manually updating the DMALL field of RSMDATASTATE is not recommended.

entry.title: Crystal Reports for Visual Studio vs. Crystal Reports
entry.content:
I am working a intranet project that makes use of many reports that were originally developed using Crystal IX.  The automation of these reports still operates on CRAXDDRT, but the plan is to replace that automation using the .NET libraries.

A question was asked about the IDE for building reports and whether there is any difference between the interface offered in Visual Studio and that offered by the stand-alone install. Also, if we were going to make use of both is there some sort of compatibility guideline to follow?

I suppose this is a good start and thank you.

- N

entry.title: Re: Too many entries in smq1 with destination none
entry.content: The MCEX47 queue specifically handles data extraction for the Inventory Management module. Queues with entries marked as destination: none generally indicate that the system hasn't assigned a destination for data transfer, which could be a result of inactive or misconfigured delta data loads to BW. Chec if there is an inventory  delta data loads in BW system. Use transaction SMQ1 to check the contents of the queue MCEX47. Check if there are any unprocessed LUWs (Logical Units of Work) and determine whether the data has already been extracted or if it is still needed for BW.

entry.title: Choose a SAP module or stick with S/4 Hana
entry.content:
Hi all,

I hope you're all doing great.

I have an IT degree and 15 yrs of experience in QA/Testing. I'm thinking about transitioning to SAP and would love to know which module would suit my career goals best. I should admit that coding isn't my strong suit, but I do have a good understanding on databases and ETL processes.

I had some training in S/4 HANA in the past, however it did not align with my career aspirations, leading me to continue in the testing domain. I sense that I am at a crossroads and believe it is time for a change.

Any suggestions on which functional SAP module that fits my skills? And if I continue to focus on S/4 HANA, will that be sufficient to secure a job without prior knowledge of other SAP modules? 

Thanks in advance.

Cheers, RG!

entry.title: Re: crystal viewer parameter loses value on navigation
entry.content: Don, I was able to implement the saving of the report in the session and add the code looking at the postback. All works *almost* perfectly now (yeah! Thank you!), meaning no more losing of the param value on navigation, no "please wait" spinning either and can export fine (these were also an issue) . The onyl problem now is that when i re-runt he report with a different parameter (obtained from the web form input at runtime) the first time is ok, but the 2nd time choosing a different value, it is not going thru the showReport() where all happens when it is the first time. The reason is that the report was saved in the session, but it has not been removed on Page_Unload()! On Page_Unload(), I am only doing report.Close(); report.Dispose(); but this does not remove the report from the session. Not surprisingly, when i re-run the report a second time, it still uses the first value from the session (which is old, fromt he first time it ran). I have added a sess.Remove("Report"); to the Page_Unload method. Let me try, I think that should do the trick

entry.title: Re: SAP PI/PO SFTP to SFTP pass trough scenario UNIX to W...
entry.content:
Hello guys.

Looking in a oficial SAP documentation, the parameter name should be "mode":

https://help.sap.com/doc/saphelp_nw73ehp1/7.31.19/en-US/96/f04142099eb76be10000000a155106/content.htm?no_cache=true

I configured "mode" instead of "convert" and it worked as expected:

 

Thank you for all support and help.

Fellipe

We have browesed all available information on forums and documentation without any luck.

Miguel

entry.title: Re: crystal viewer parameter loses value on navigation
entry.content: Don, please see my previous posting ('*almost* perfectly): Now, when I added the line in Page_Unload() to remove the report from the session (Session.Remove("Report")), now I get a prompt from Crystal "Enter Values" when i try to go to the next page. It says "The report you requested requires further information" and asks me for Server name, User name and Password. Why??

entry.title: Re: ERROR=CANNOT USE DUPLICATE TRIGGER NAME
entry.content: from application job server log, the import sql only shows once time. so the application job should only execute once. Another finding is that - when I see this duplicated trigger error in the application job log, I connect to hana and see the target schema is still there and empty. If I manually execute the exact same import query in dbeaver, it's SUCCESS. so strange

entry.title: Log on to CMC or BI Launch is not authenticating my Credentials.
entry.content:
Hi,

I have Installed SAP Crystal Server 2020 on Windows Server. After Successful installation, I'm trying to log in to CMC and BI Launch UI. But strange thing both are not able to authenticate my credentials. below is the error.

'Account information not recognized: Enterprise authentication could not log you on. Please make sure your logon information is correct. (FWB 00008).
 
I'm using the same credentials that I use to log in to the server where I have Installed Crystal Server. And also, I'm using the same password which I have used in while configuring CMS account in installation was wizard.  Still, I'm not able to login. Any hint where I'm missing? 
If at all how to reset account details after installation and use?  Please suggest.
 
Thanks,
Karuna

entry.title: Re: Universal Parallel Accounting in SAP S/4HANA
entry.content: Hello, is UPA strictly required for Advanced Intercompany Sales?

entry.title: Re: SEN companion for the desktop several work areas
entry.content:
Hi Azov,

I'm pretty certain that this is possible but cannot find a reference to this in the standard documentation.  The easiest thing to do is to raise a support ticket using the Component ID KM-SEN-NAV and ask for documentation on this scenario.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: Add Transalation button to SAP Enable Now navigation bar
entry.content:
Hi Amrita,

If Mani's suggestion does not fix your issue and you are using a custom Trainer Style to playback the content, please open and resave the customer Trainer Style in the Style Editor in Producer.  When this capability was added to Enable Now, older versions of Trainer Styles did not automatically get the new capability so have to be resaved to get them to show the translation functionality.  Outside that, please also ensure that you are doing your testing by playing back content from Manager, not Producer.  This button does not show when you playback content from Producer.

Regards
Shane

entry.title: SMD agent version request
entry.content:
Hi Team,

We plan to built new landscape out of the existing GE account. To do that we need SMD agent (720_SP08.33) to install which compatible to current solman system. 
Hence please allow us access to download archive software from MP 

Request for SMDA720_SP08_33_xxx.SAR file. Please enable the access and confirm.


------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SMD agent version request
entry.content:
Dear customer,

Please choose below Diagnostic Agent installation files (DIAGNOSTICS AGENT 7.53) according to your Solution Manager version: 

 

 DIAGNOSTICS AGENT 7.53 ( DIAGNOSTICSAGENT.SAR on the Kernel Media )

  • Release 720 ( see table above)
  • Patch Level: latest ( >= the patch level mentioned in the table above)
  • From https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/softwarecenter/template/products/_APP=00200682500000001943&_EVENT=DISPHIER&HEADER=Y&FUNCTIONBAR=N&EVENT=TREE&NE=NAVIGATE&ENR=73554900100200008550&V=MAINT

>= 7.2 SP12 

Download 720.14.21(released on 2024-OCT-07) when connecting against SAP Solution Manager >= 7.2 SP12

- SMDA720_SP14_21-80003641.SAR

 

>= 7.2 SP0 and <= 7.2 SP11

Download 720.11.22(released on 2024-JAN-23) when connecting against SAP Solution Manager >= 7.2 SP0 and <= 7.2 SP11:

  • SMDA720_SP11_22-80003641.SAR

 

The full installation strategy could be found in SAP Note2253383 - Diagnostics Agent - SWPM Archive-Based Installation

 

Best regards,

SAP Support

I also checked the program for transferring data from the CO Table to ACDOCP, but it didn't work. Do I miss some configuration or another program to run?

Thanks

Is there an app that can display a list of Service Order items?

The "Manage Service Order App" allows you to view the headers of a Service Order at a glance,
but does not allow you to view them at the items level of a Service Order.

Is there any solution?

Soma

entry.title: Urgent Issue : Transport API Management with TMS to different tenant
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I'm trying to transport API Management to different tenant.
■What I did

  • I have configured these settings following below URL.
    https://help.sap.com/docs/cloud-integration/sap-cloud-integration/content-transport-using-cloud-transport-management?locale=en-US&q=transport
    =>Transporting Cloud Integration packages was successful.
  • I tried to subscribe API Portal Service and create Destination following below link.
    =>Couldn't success above attempt because newly subscription of API Portal is restricted.
    https://help.sap.com/docs/sap-api-management/sap-api-management/setting-up-api-portal-application-using-api-management-standalone-tile?locale=en-US&version=Cloud
    • Instead of above attempt, I created Destination of APIM which contains same config as the one of CloudIntegration except for the name.
    • And, added the property, "sourceSystemId.APIManagement" to the Destination of TMS

But now, I'm facing below trouble. Does anyone know how to resolve it?

  • failed to transport API Management

entry.title: Re: Help! Why Don’t I Get a Notification for My Custom Situation?
entry.content:
Hi.

This post is really useful. Thanks. I got a question: It is possible to sent just 1 aggregated email? My customer is happy with the individual notifications for each STO document in Fiori, but the problem is that on a weekly execution, it could easily mean 20 or more emails sent out of the system going to the same person. Do you know if there is any badi that I could use to aggregate the email by Situation Object.

 

Best Regards and Thanks in advance.

 

Luis Lara.

entry.title: Re: Microsoft Teams Integration with SuccessFactors - New 'Home' tab in the SuccessFactors App
entry.content:
@StephenBurns 

The user mapping issue messages will be enhanced to provide more relavent info for troubleshooting. 

Message customization is difficult to implement but we'll invest in this area starting 2505 release. 

Like all SAP/SF SaaS, it's expected that customer (not individual users) have a certain help from SAP/SF team. There's little an end user can do  before the configuration is done by admins, so the message doesn't seem to be too helpful.

Thank you for your honest feedback and we'll continue to improve the experience!

entry.title: Re: Uses Cases for Situation Handling in SAP S/4HANA Sales.
entry.content:
Thanks, this post is great.

I have created a custom situation handling to track promotions by status. Is in UAT now and the user like it. The only complaint is that the Notification Engine generates one email per document identified by the situation. I wonder if there is a way to aggregate the email by Situation Object but leave the notification in Fiori as it is ( per document ). There is just one person who really needs to check the messages, so she would like to get 1 email instead of multiple ones as a reminder that she has to log in to FLP to check all the messages.

Best Regards and Thanks in advance:

Luis Lara.

entry.title: Encoding Conversion Groovy Script
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

I am now writing Groovy script for Encoding Conversion.

To be specific, a script for the conversion between Shift_JIS and UTF-8. 

I have completed the scripts that can do the one-way conversion from Shift_JIS to UTF-8, as well as the one-way conversion from UTF-8 to Shift_JIS.

However, when I want to write a two-way conversion script, it did not work well on Cloud Integration.

Could anyone kindly help me with this?

 

 

As your reference, here are the scripts that I wrote.

1)one-way conversion from Shift_JIS to UTF-8 (Worked Well)

import com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.util.Message
import java.nio.charset.StandardCharsets

def Message processData(Message message) {
    // Get the body as a byte array to preserve the original encoding
    def bodyBytes = message.getBody(byte[])
    
    // Convert the Shift_JIS byte array to a UTF-8 string
    def utf8String = new String(bodyBytes, "Shift_JIS").getBytes(StandardCharsets.UTF_8)
    
    // Set the converted UTF-8 byte array as the new body
    message.setBody(utf8String)
    
    // Set the output charset to UTF-8
    message.setProperty("CamelCharsetName", "UTF-8")
    
    return message
}

2)one-way conversion from UTF-8 to Shift_JIS (Worked Well)

import com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.util.Message
import java.nio.charset.StandardCharsets

def Message processData(Message message) {
    // Get the body as a byte array (assuming it's in UTF-8)
    def bodyBytes = message.getBody(byte[])
    
    // Convert the UTF-8 byte array to a Shift_JIS string
    def shiftJisString = new String(bodyBytes, StandardCharsets.UTF_8).getBytes("Shift_JIS")
    
    // Set the converted Shift_JIS byte array as the new body
    message.setBody(shiftJisString)
    
    // Set the output charset to Shift_JIS
    message.setProperty("CamelCharsetName", "Shift_JIS")
    
    return message
}

 

3)two-way conversion between UTF-8 and Shift_JIS (Not Working Well)

import com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.util.Message
import java.nio.charset.StandardCharsets

def Message processData(Message message) {
    // Define the source and target encodings here
    def sourceEncoding = "Shift_JIS"  // Change this to your source encoding
    def targetEncoding = "UTF-8"  // Change this to your target encoding
    
    // Get the body as a byte array
    def bodyBytes = message.getBody(byte[])
    
    def convertedBytes
    
    // Perform the conversion based on the specified encodings
    if (sourceEncoding == "Shift_JIS" && targetEncoding == "UTF-8") {
        convertedBytes = new String(bodyBytes, "Shift_JIS").getBytes(StandardCharsets.UTF_8)
    } else if (sourceEncoding == "UTF-8" && targetEncoding == "Shift_JIS") {
        convertedBytes = new String(bodyBytes, StandardCharsets.UTF_8).getBytes("Shift_JIS")
    } else {
        // For other encoding combinations, use a more general approach
        convertedBytes = new String(bodyBytes, sourceEncoding).getBytes(targetEncoding)
    }
    
    // Set the converted byte array as the new body
    message.setBody(convertedBytes)
    
    // Set the output charset
    message.setProperty("CamelCharsetName", targetEncoding)
    
    return message
}

 

To add on, (3)two-way conversion between UTF-8 and Shift_JIS works well when it is SJIS to UTF-8.

However, it does not work when it is UTF-8 to SJIS.

 

Thank you in advance.

entry.title: Re: Accessing long text of SAP Master data Objects or fields in S4 Hana through a CDS View
entry.content: @charanjit_marwah1 for information, you may target people individually via a hyperlink (the way I'm targeting you specifically), otherwise you may only hope those people have subscribed to the blog.

entry.title: Scripting in Adapt UI for classic applications with Screen Personas
entry.content:
Collaborative effort of Smitha Koppar

This blog post will provide  information on how to do scripting in Adapt UI for classic applications with Screen Personas in SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Edition.

Introduction

The SAP S/4HANA Public Cloud Edition 2208 release brought several enhancements, including a new barcode scanning feature that improves operational efficiency and accuracy in inventory management and logistics. The barcode scanning functionality allows users to quickly and accurately capture data, reducing manual entry errors and speeding up processes like goods receipt, inventory counts, and order fulfilment. Integrating a barcode scanner into classic apps on tablets is a great way to streamline data entry! By adding a scan button to input fields, users can quickly capture information using the device’s camera, which can significantly reduce the time and effort required for manual entry.

The same can be seen in blog.

https://community.sap.com/t5/enterprise-resource-planning-blogs-by-sap/adapt-ui-in-sap-s-4hana-cloud-2208-includes-new-barcode-scanning-feature/ba-p/13540869

Adapt UI and Processes

Lets see how this can be done in SAP S/4HANA Public cloud edition.

Use case with scripting

Let’s see a practical use case.

Customer says “I’ve added the scan button to the Order and Material field.  If there is no material field that appears, the Scan button is still visible… is it possible to set this so that it only appears if there is a material field that comes up?  “

The requirement can be achieved via scripting.

Scripting programmatically define the system behaviour for custom UI elements that were added through the Insert tab in the flavor manager.

For example, screens can be skipped and fields can be prefilled. SAP Screen Personas scripts are small pieces of JavaScript code that can be attached to individual UI elements with control events, or entire screens with screen events.

Below is small demo and logic for scripting for achieving customer requirement.

 

 

 

if (session.idExists("id of input field")) {

   session.findById("id of SCAN button").show();

} else {

   session.findById("id of SCAN button").hide();

}

 

 

 

References

https://community.sap.com/t5/technology-blogs-by-sap/adapt-ui-for-classic-applications-with-screen-personas-integral-part-of-the/ba-p/13564222

https://pages.community.sap.com/topics/screen-personas

https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_SCREEN_PERSONAS/20993a0c28654a26beb2b63b722d74f2/8d43f46ac9e94b828b8e52e34d779310.html

__PRESENT

entry.title: Re: CDS combine lines into one
entry.content: Split into 3 cds one for Material and Column with conditions Column is not initial. then try to create new cds from main cds with left outer joining three cds..

entry.title: Re: Some issues with the SuccessFactors Microsoft Teams i...
entry.content:
@StephenBurns 

  1. For the first point, a couple of comments
    1. "The app is unavailable due to user mapping issues. Please contact your administrator for help" - we do not disclose too much information to the end user so as to not reveal technical or configuration details to relieve them of this burden. We rely on admins who implemented the connection to have an impression that this could be a result of the user mapping they previously set up, since user mapping is one step in the configuration page. I do agree that for this message - it is useful to have it linked to an FAQ or enhance to reveal more info what the mapping issue refers to, we can investigate whether this option is possible. In addition, we have a KBA that explains how to troubleshoot when the same error appears on the Admin configuration page: https://userapps.support.sap.com/sap/support/knowledge/en/3371538 
    2. As for "unable to reach app", this is intended to be a generic message as the root cause cannot be differentiated and reflected in the message without troubleshooting, we display this generic message in the hopes of the user trying to access the app again, or asking for admins for help and eventually submit a Support ticket for engineers to take a closer look. We will explore the possibility of enhancing this message, or at least add some guidance for next step.
    3. Lastly, some of these error messages only occur under Application type permission. If you switch to Delegated type permission, there will be no user mapping issues since the login is triggered by the user themselves. You may see documentation about this type of set up here: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_SUCCESSFACTORS_PLATFORM/3adee415c1eb4b918bc0172afc76948c/7e014829b6684da3849fe2a4e2142f3a.html and a video demo here: https://sapvideo.cfapps.eu10-004.hana.ondemand.com/?entry_id=1_wtw6ptgu
  2. This seems to be config issue. If you don't have view pay statement configured in SuccessFactors, this will not shown up in the Teams App, we follow permissioning and configuration. As for the Help guide - we do need a space to display all supported actions, but would need to re-consider what else is the option here instead of exposing it to an end user. What would be your suggestion here - to remove the help link completely? In 2025, we are considering making the Help card text customizable. This is a good opportunity for you to remove the link there.
  3. Formatting issue is fixed. Please check again
  4. This is an issue that you could bring to the EC team, as we follow whatever template they provide.
  5. Is this related to #4? If so, feel free reach out to EC
  6. To my knowledge, you should be able to customize what is displayed in EC quick actions on the web. Have you tried reaching out to EC?
  7. Regarding people profile Teams chat link - this is on the Roadmap, please stay tuned.
  8. Sign out issue - this is currently expected behaviour that we don't allow a sign out under Application type permission. Is there a reason you need to sign out?  In addition if you chose to use Delegated type permission (like I mentioned in 1.3), we support a Connect/Disconnect command, which resembles and is purposed to mimic the act of sign in/sign out. 
  9. Home page and org chart - Which home page are you referring to? The Home tab in Teams? Currently, the labels are not customizable, but the content is. The content will by default show what you have configured. We display your HR Manager and your Cost Centre by default on the Home tab as we feel it is 'not easily found' information and would like to make it prominent for you when you need it. Regarding org chart - isn't this already a feature in Teams to view Organization structure? We do not feel the need to replicate this in the App if it is already available as part of the Teams core App.
  10. Customizable text - we have this planned to be able to customize the Help card in 2025. Please stay tuned.
  11. App message for when the App is downloaded by the user but App connection is not set up - we will investigate possible message enhancement there.
  12. Regarding lack of features - I would argue that we have plenty of feature as documented under the SuccessFactors App section of this guide: https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_SUCCESSFACTORS_PLATFORM/3adee415c1eb4b918bc0172afc76948c/373e3d10260843b8bd0be1d556f4c762.html there are demo videos under each feature. Is there any other enhancement ideas or feature you feel would be useful in Teams, please feel free to submit Influence ideas under the Work Tech feature area here: https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/campaign/3508

entry.title: Re: Error: Cannot find module '@sap/hana-client' in CAPM Project
entry.content: Did you find an answer for this by chance?

entry.title: Re: Microsoft Teams Integration with SuccessFactors - New 'Home' tab in the SuccessFactors App
entry.content:
@StephenBurns  I just replied to your comments in this post:

https://community.sap.com/t5/human-capital-management-q-a/some-issues-with-the-successfactors-microsoft-teams-integration/qaq-p/13704996/comment-id/38004#M38004

entry.title: \/SCWM/IM_PC transaction code, all line items are visible, including those that have not been staged
entry.content:
We have created a process order after which we perform partial staging using transaction COR2. However, I've noticed that in the /SCWM/IM_PC transaction code, all line items are visible, including those that have not been staged.

 

Ideally, we should only see the line item that has been staged. Because of this behavior every delivery document contains all the components which are already staged or needs to be staged. We get quantity as zero for the components which are not staged, however by this behavior our users get confused as all the materials show up every time and it is inconvenient as a human to check all the materials to find which has quantity more than zero.

 

Kindly help us on this process as we wish to only see the components which are staged while the delivery is created, this would help the users to efficiently bring in the required quantity for dispensing.

entry.title: Re: Accessing long text of SAP Master data Objects or fields in S4 Hana through a CDS View
entry.content:
@koyaajai You're right, the possible text objects are listed here. There's a workaround to extend the list to other text objects, proposed in the comments by @jeremiah_duroya (although not supported by SAP).

(as of S/4HANA 2023: /PF1/AC_CL, /PF1/AC_DL, /PLMB/RCP, APPROVAL, AUFK, CATS, CRM_ORDERH, CRM_ORDERI, C_SHES_TRI, DRAD, EKKO, EKPO, EQUI, ICM_BP, ICM_LOC, ICM_OBJ, ICM_REL, IFLOT, IMPTT, IMRG, INET, MATERIAL, MPCR, MPLA, MPOS, QMEL, RE, ROUTING, SCMG_CASE, WAPI, WBRK, WBRP, WCOCOH, WCOCOI).

@jeremiah_duroya Thank you, excellent workaround (how to extend this limited list of text objects, although as you say, the note 3048704 - Long text (SAPScript) search enablement for CDS-based search - SAP for Me says explicitly it's not supported: "3.Replication is supported only for SAP delivered models and not for Custom search models")

entry.title: Re: Hello Support I want to add Invoice With Branch Using...
entry.content:
Hi nitmanet168,

You can use the following sample code:

 

SAPbobsCOM.Documents lDocuments = (SAPbobsCOM.Documents)oCompany.GetBusinessObject(SAPbobsCOM.BoObjectTypes.oInvoices);
lDocuments.CardCode = "C20000";
lDocuments.Series = 3134;
lDocuments.DocType = SAPbobsCOM.BoDocumentTypes.dDocument_Items;
lDocuments.DocDate = new DateTime(2024, 07, 24);
lDocuments.DocDueDate = new DateTime(2024, 07, 24);
lDocuments.TaxDate = new DateTime(2024, 07, 24);
lDocuments.Comments = "Test via DI";
lDocuments.BPL_IDAssignedToInvoice = 18;
lDocuments.Lines.ItemCode = "A00001";
lDocuments.Lines.WarehouseCode = "01";
lDocuments.Lines.Quantity = 3.0;
lDocuments.Lines.TaxCode = "IGST18";
int AlDocuments = lDocuments.Add();

 

Where BPL_IDAssignedToInvoice is used to assign an active Branch.

Hope it helps!

Kind regards,

ANKIT CHAUHAN

SAP Business One Support

entry.title: Cannot join tables because Data in Columns : resb.sermat and resb.banfn fully blank
entry.content:
Hi everyone, In Tcode -IW39, I am trying to join the below tables to get data from the component. but I got an issue with column resb.sermat and resb.banfn is fully blank.
So what should I need to do to join these tables?
Best Regards

 

(from exsch_sap.ext_afih afih

left join exsch_sap.ext_aufk aufk on afih.mandt = aufk.mandt and afih.aufnr = aufk.aufnr

left join exsch_sap.ext_afko afko on aufk.mandt = afko.mandt and aufk.aufnr = afko.aufnr

left join exsch_sap.ext_iloa iloa on afih.mandt = iloa.mandt and afih.iloan = iloa.iloan)

left join exsch_sap.ext_resb resb on viaufks.mandt = resb.mandt and viaufks.swerk = resb.werks and viaufks.rsnum = resb.rsnum and viaufks.swerk = resb.werks

left join exsch_sap.ext_eban eban on viaufks.mandt = eban.mandt and eban.matnr = resb.matnr and eban.arsps = resb.rspos

left join exsch_sap.ext_eket eket on viaufks.mandt = eket.mandt and eban.bnfpo = eket.bnfpo and eban.banfn = eket.banfn)

entry.title: Re: ERROR=CANNOT USE DUPLICATE TRIGGER NAME
entry.content: Make sure that the import process is correctly renaming the triggers. If it's not, this could be causing the error. Otherwise, it could be a bug.

entry.title: Re: Back Date Forecast not considered in MRP Run in SAP Business One
entry.content: I am also facing the same error. If you find the answer please let me know.

entry.title: Re: Copy Measures across hierarchies member using Advance...
entry.content:
You should put scope into MEMBERSET, and just replace FLOW as needed, similar as below:

MEMBERSET [d/Account] = "C010101"
MEMBERSET [d/Product] = "TEST"
MEMBERSET [d/Plant] = "PR01"
MEMBERSET [d/Entity] = "ENT01"
MEMBERSET [d/OWNER] = "SPA"
MEMBERSET [d/Measure] = ("Value", "PERCENTAGE")
MEMBERSET [d/Flow] = "#"

DATA([d/Flow] = "01.01") = RESULTLOOKUP()

entry.title: Re: Differences between planned, schedule and actual dates in projects
entry.content: Hello Ismael,

entry.title: Re: SAP BAS access denied after activating SAP Build Apps
entry.content: Hi Gowtham, did you get any answer for this issue. I am also facing similar kind of issue.

entry.title: Re: Differences between planned, schedule and actual date...
entry.content: Hello Ismael, You can refer to the help documentation: Maintaining Projects - Project Plan https://help.sap.com/docs/SAP_BUSINESS_BYDESIGN/2754875d2d2a403f95e58a41a9c7d6de/2cdbd3eb722d1014aea1fabe56a9d37e.html?locale=en-US You can edit dates and durations for the project header or for project tasks. Based on your entered data, the system calculates the earliest and latest dates. All the dates are categorized into several groups: Planned Dates Scheduled Dates Actual Dates The displayed fields vary depending on whether the project header or project task is currently selected. The actual start date on the project task level is the date of the earliest recorded time confirmation via the time sheet; it is also editable for the project manager. The actual start date of the project is the earliest actual start date of all project tasks. When the project status is in planning, the scheduling is performed automatically by the system. When the project status is started or released, the scheduling has to be triggered manually by clicking Schedule. The actual finish date on project task level is editable for the project manager. The actual finish date of the project is the date when the project has been completed or closed (corresponds to the completion date of the project) or is the date when the project has been stopped. The duration of a phase or task can only be changed if there are no subordinate tasks. If the phase or task has subordinate tasks, its duration is automatically calculated by the system and cannot be changed. If the actual start/finish date on the project header level is populated, then Project Duration is automatically populated. There is no duration for milestones.

entry.title: Setup email to actually send to my e-mail address

entry.title: Re: How to download XML file to computer on RAP

entry.title: Re: SAP Public Cloud : Create New Company Code.
entry.content: Added CBC tag.

entry.title: Re: AR Aging for S4 HANA Public Cloud Professional Servic...
entry.content:
Hello, there is very little information provided here. In case you are trying to build a custom report then a single CDS view may not be sufficient to give you all the required fields. E.g. WBS element is available in the CDS I_OperationalAcctgDocItem (ACDOCA) but WBS Description is not. So if you need WBS description then join the CDS I_WBSElementData_2 to create a custom CDS to fetch the description field. But this is just an example!

Thank You!

entry.title: SAC Data Action - Calculating Allocation % is not summing to 100%
entry.content:
Hi All ,

1) I have the Kgs produced (Decimal to 7 places) measure to store the data at Farm and Product level, Material = "#" and Customer = "#" (input by users)

 

2) I have the Kgs Sold (Decimal to 7 places) measure to store the data at Farm = "#" and Product , Material and Customer level (input by users)

 

3) Price ($/Kg) entered at Farm = "#" and Product, Material and Customer level (input by users) 

 

3) Data Action Starts:- 

Step 1: - Calculates the Allocation % based on the Kg produced data (you can see that the data is not summing up to 100%

 

2) Step 2:- Calculate the Sales Qty (Trays) = Sales Qty (Kgs) / Kgs to Tray Conversion Factor 

3) Step 3:- Calculate the Sales Qty (Pallets) = Sales Qty (Kgs) / Kgs to Pallet Conversion Factor 

4) Step 4:-  Calculate the Sales Revenue ($) = Sales Qty (Kgs) * Price ($/Kg)

5) Step 5:- Bringing down the Sales Qty (Kgs/Trays/Pallets/Revenue) pushed down from Farm = # to individual Farms (Farm 1/2/3/4) based on the Allocation %s calculated in Step 1 of the data action.

the Allocated data doesn't come down to round up to the because the allocation % are not 100% .

is there any way I can have the allocation % to 100%.

entry.title: Add-on not visible in SAP Business One with browser access
entry.content:
I've developed an add-on using the Extension Registration Data Center (Extension Package), following the instructions in the document [How to Package and Deploy SAP Business One Extensions for Lightweight Deployment].

The add-on works fine in FP 2202 and 2405, but it doesn't appear in FP 2208.

Does anyone know what could be causing this issue or if I'm missing something?"

entry.content: This error is showing during the installation of ui5 to Eclipse.

entry.title: Re: aATP ABC set-up not confirming orders
entry.content:
Hi Shilpa,

yes, ABC can sometimes a bit challenging to setup correctly and to find out why ABC is not running correctly.

Development team is working on a logging for this so you will get a chance to know why ABC was not executed.

For now, I can just recommend to have a look at my FAQ KBA - 2776851 FAQ: Alternative based Confirmation (ABC) with aATP - where you find a restrictions and a check list for the customizing - see question 1.

Its already a long list - but covers most of the common customizing issues.

Hope this helps.

best regards,

Michael

entry.title: Re: Integration of SUSE Linux Enterprise High Availability Extension and Red Hat Enterprise Linux 7.
entry.content: Very helpful information for production cluster environment.....thanks

entry.title: Re: aATP ABC set-up not confirming orders
entry.content: Hi Shilpa, have you set up Review Availability Check Result? With this you can see the intermediate result and all confirmations calculated during the ATP Check to get full insights. This often helps to answer such questions. One thought without knowing the config of Alternative Determination: If you state that only full confirmation should be allowed, then there is no delivery proposal, as it would basically be a contradiction. Could you share also your Altv. Det. setup?

entry.title: Re: Encoding Conversion Groovy Script
entry.content:
Hi , Can you please try a little modified code 

import com.sap.gateway.ip.core.customdev.util.Message
import java.nio.charset.StandardCharsets

def Message processData(Message message) {
// Define the source and target encodings here
def sourceEncoding = "UTF-8" 
def targetEncoding = "Shift_JIS" 

// Get the body as a byte array
def bodyBytes = message.getBody(byte[].class)

def convertedBytes


if (sourceEncoding == "UTF-8" && targetEncoding == "Shift_JIS") {
convertedBytes = new String(bodyBytes, StandardCharsets.UTF_8).getBytes("Shift_JIS")
} else if (sourceEncoding == "Shift_JIS" && targetEncoding == "UTF-8") {
convertedBytes = new String(bodyBytes, "Shift_JIS").getBytes(StandardCharsets.UTF_8)
} else {

convertedBytes = new String(bodyBytes, sourceEncoding).getBytes(targetEncoding)
}


message.setBody(convertedBytes)

// Set the output charset
message.setProperty("CamelCharsetName", targetEncoding)

return message
}

entry.title: Re: Enabling your workforce for the future with the new integrated learning experience
entry.content:
@GabbyZilkha 

Hi,

thank you for your insights. Can I elaborate on the rules of displaying entity titles:

"If the title has been defined in multiple languages then, 

  • The results will show the title of the learning activity that has the best match. 
  • In case there is no best match, the system will show the title in the users locale. 
  • In case the users locale is not available for the learning, the entity ID will be displayed instead of a title. "

Could the third bullet may be changed according to this influence request, as this rule produces some weird results - for example correctly displays "product" in non-englisch languages, when searching for "product", but "products" won't be displayed but the entity ID instead. We would greatly appreciate that the influence request for a fallback language will be implemented. https://influence.sap.com/sap/ino/#/idea/330419

entry.title: Re: SAP Omnichannel Promotion Pricing - Enable outbound processing using SAP Cloud Integration
entry.content:
I Pradeep, I am not 100% sure I get the question. If you want to retrieve the included and excluded products, they would be contained in the merchandise set nodes (one product per record). One merchandise set node entry also contains the information about promotion ID and merchandise set ID. Have you checked Schema View | Data Access | SAP Business Accelerator Hub?
What exactly do you mean by "schema for retrieving..." this information? What is the starting point, and which information do you already have then?

Best regards, Andreas

entry.title: Re: SAP DM: An error occurred while activating shop floor...
entry.content: Hi @Sayuj
